rows.label: qev011001_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey there, fellow professional.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0002
rows.name:
How's business?
...It's been terrible on my end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0003
rows.name:
It was supposed to be a standard extermination mission.
But...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0004
rows.name: As luck would have it, we encountered the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0005
rows.name:
The team was split up early on,
and we ended up in a situation where we each
had to face them entirely alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0006
rows.name: Defeat was... inevitable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0007
rows.name:
But I swear, we didn't neglect our preparations.
It was just a combination of unpredictable factors and bad luck.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0008
rows.name:
But... resulting in the loss of two members...
[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0009
rows.name: It seems I've lost my touch as a team leader.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev011001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about a member named Law.

rows.label: qev011001_JNK0020
rows.name: Sympathize

rows.label: qev011001_SEL0021
rows.name: Mention that you've experienced bad luck too.

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Law?
Law is indeed a member of our team, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0011
rows.name: You have terrible timing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0012
rows.name:
One of the two members we lost is none other
than Law.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0013
rows.name:
Please, spare me your sympathy.
Pity from a fellow professional cuts the deepest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0014
rows.name:
I know I brought it up myself, but if I just brush it all off
as bad luck, I wouldn't be able to face Taohua over there
...or Law.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0015
rows.name:
...What's that?
You had business with Law?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0016
rows.name: Well, that's some bad timing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0017
rows.name: Law was taken down by the enemy on this mission...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0018
rows.name:
We gave him basic first aid, of course,
but his wounds were too deep for him to stand on his own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0019
rows.name:
In order to save the other members,
we had no choice but to leave him behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0020
rows.name:
It wasn't just Marnucks, there were Verderos too.
We couldn't possibly fight them off in our Inners...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0021
rows.name: So I left Law behind... right in the middle of the enemy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0023
rows.name:
...?
The place where we parted ways with Law?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0024
rows.name: It was a cave-like area under a collapsed bridge, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0025
rows.name: ...Don't tell me you're planning a rescue?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0026
rows.name: Well... I couldn't ask for anything more, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0027
rows.name: The enemy is strong, you know? Are you sure you'll be okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0028
rows.name:
...I see.
Well, asking a fellow professional "Are you sure?"
was a stupid question.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0029
rows.name:
We always act knowing our own capabilities.
...That's the ironclad rule.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0030
rows.name:
Sorry...
Let me officially make a request then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0031
rows.name: Please rescue my comrade, Law.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0032
rows.name:
To do that, you'll first need to take out
some of the Growth to secure the area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0033
rows.name:
The location is northwest of here—
in a cave under a collapsed bridge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0034
rows.name: Encountering the Growth was completely unexpected.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0035
rows.name:
The location is northwest of here, in a cave-like area
under a collapsed bridge, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0036
rows.name:
Don't underestimate them.
The enemies are quite skilled.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0037
rows.name:
You made it back safely—
Judging by your expression, Law was already
just a corpse...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0038
rows.name:
He was a cheerful jokester,
but he had guts and was a good guy—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0039
rows.name:
Well, anyway, I'm sorry for putting this on you.
Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0040
rows.name:
I don't want to call it revenge,
but taking down the Growth does give me
some peace of mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0041
rows.name:
...So?
What business did you have with Law?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0042
rows.name:
Given how things turned out,
I'll help you with whatever I can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_JNK0030
rows.name: Ask

rows.label: qev011001_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask about the key.

rows.label: qev011001_JNK0040
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev011001_SEL0041
rows.name: Confirm information about Law.

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0043
rows.name:
A key?
Ah, now that you mention it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0044
rows.name:
He showed me something proudly once, saying,
"This thing is incredibly valuable..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0045
rows.name:
It looked like an old-fashioned key,
so I thought it was completely bogus, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0046
rows.name: Maybe the punchline is that it was actually real.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0047
rows.name:
Did Law...
have any information about treasure, you ask?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0048
rows.name: Are you talking about that key by any chance?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0049
rows.name:
He showed it off to me once, saying,
"This thing is incredibly valuable..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0050
rows.name:
If Law had any information related to treasure,
that would probably be the only thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0051
rows.name: This is... the pendant Law always wore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0052
rows.name:
Look at the pendant head.
It looks like a key, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0053
rows.name:
He insisted it was a real key,
but we all thought it was just a tall tale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0054
rows.name: Honestly, I'm still a bit skeptical even now, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0055
rows.name: You have nothing to lose, so take it if you'd like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0056
rows.name:
Well, there are other things to keep as mementos,
and I'm sure Law would want to give something as thanks
to the person who carried his body back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0057
rows.name: See you around. Thank you for everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0058
rows.name: If you actually find treasure with that key—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011001_MSG0059
rows.name:
leave some extraordinarily gorgeous flowers
at his grave for me.[ST:wait ]
